Title: Send default notification template
Preconditions: Admin logged in; notification module installed
Steps:
1. Navigate to Notifications
2. Select a notification type
3. Open default template
4. Click Send to test email

Title: Send template for concrete localization
Steps:
1. Navigate to Notifications
2. Select notification with multiple language templates
3. Choose a specific localization
4. Send to test email

Title: Disable notification
Steps:
1. Navigate to Notifications
2. Select a notification type
3. Toggle Active = OFF
4. Trigger the notification event

Title: Unregistered notifications handling
Steps:
1. Navigate to Notifications
2. Check for unregistered notification types

Title: Create template with sample data preview
Steps:
1. Navigate to Notifications
2. Select a notification type
3. Click Preview
4. Enter sample data
5. Click Preview button

Title: Edit sample data in preview
Preconditions: Preview is open with sample data
Steps:
1. Edit sample data JSON fields
2. Click Preview

Title: Share preview - send email with preview
Steps:
1. Click Share in preview
2. Enter valid email address
3. Click Send

Title: Share preview - invalid email validation
Steps:
1. Click Share
2. Enter invalid email format
3. Attempt to send

Title: Search notifications list
Steps:
1. Navigate to Notifications list
2. Enter search term in search field

Title: Search by notification type
Steps:
1. Navigate to Notifications list
2. Search by notification type name

Title: Add new notification template
Steps:
1. Navigate to Notifications
2. Select notification type
3. Click Add Template
4. Select language
5. Enter template content
6. Save

Title: Add default template
Steps:
1. Select notification type
2. Click Add Template
3. Select Default language
4. Enter content and Save

Title: Overwrite template with same localization
Steps:
1. Add new template for same localization
2. Confirm overwrite

Title: Save changes for email template
Steps:
1. Edit email template content
2. Click Save

Title: Save changes for SMS template
Steps:
1. Edit SMS template content
2. Click Save

Title: Undo template changes
Steps:
1. Make changes to template
2. Click Undo/Reset

Title: Add notification layout
Steps:
1. Navigate to Notification layouts
2. Click Add
3. Enter layout name and template
4. Save

Title: Edit notification layout
Steps:
1. Open existing layout
2. Edit template content
3. Save

Title: Delete notification layout
Steps:
1. Select layout
2. Click Delete
3. Confirm

Title: Reset notification layout
Steps:
1. Open modified layout
2. Click Reset

Title: Add notification template with layout
Steps:
1. Open notification template
2. Assign layout
3. Preview and save

Title: Check layout in sent mail
Steps:
1. Send notification with layout-assigned template
2. Check email

Title: Access permission - notifications
Steps:
1. Login as user with notification:access
2. Navigate to Notifications

Title: Template create permission
Steps:
1. Login as user with template:create
2. Add a new template

Title: Settings - manage notification languages
Steps:
1. Navigate to Settings > Notifications > Languages
2. Add a new language
3. Save

Title: Settings - delete notification language
Steps:
1. Navigate to Settings > Notifications > Languages
2. Select language and delete

Title: NotificationsSample module - install and test
Steps:
1. Install NotificationsSample module
2. Create a new template
3. Send notification
4. Update template and resend
5. Delete template
